subject: fix(theme): make body background and focus rings reactive to theme changes
body:
Replace hardcoded hex values in +html.tsx global styles with CSS
variables that Uniwind updates on theme change:

- body background: var(--color-base-200, <hex fallback>)
- input focus ring: var(--color-primary, <hex fallback>)
- button focus-visible ring: var(--color-primary, <hex fallback>)

Hex fallbacks still prevent white flash before Uniwind loads. Once
Uniwind sets the CSS variables (oklch values), the live theme colors
take over automatically — no JS needed for these updates.

Previously, body stayed dark when switching to light theme (visible
during overscroll), and focus rings used the wrong color on non-default
themes.

Tags: theme, pwa, css, accessibility
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
